name: Bengang Steel Plates Co., Ltd.
summary: Bengang Steel Plates Co., Ltd. engages in steel smelting, rolling, producing, trading, and selling ferrous metal products in the People's Republic of China. The company offers hot-rolled plates, cold-rolled sheets, special steel profiles, pig iron, and crude steel; and automotive surface panels, oil pipeline steel, container board shipboard, and other products for use in automobiles, home appliances, petrochemicals, aerospace, machinery manufacturing, energy transportation, construction and decoration, and metal products. It also involved in the electricity generation, coal chemical, railway, and import and export trade businesses. Bengang Steel Plates Co., Ltd. also exports its products to approximately 60 countries and regions. The company was incorporated in 1997 and is based in Benxi, the People's Republic of China. Bengang Steel Plates Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Benxi Steel & Iron (Group) Co. Ltd.
